results.title: AI and Content Reshape Attractions & Tours at Trip.com Group's Global Partner Forum
results.description: SHANGHAI, May 29, 2026 /PRNewswire/ -- Trip.com Group, a leading global travel service provider, explored the future of the Attractions & Tours (A&T) sector at the Attractions & Tours Global Partners Forum, part of the Group's annual Envision.2026 conference. results.title: Kenyan police arrest 8 students on suspicion of arson after deadly girls school fire
results.description: Kenyan police have arrested eight female students on suspicion of arson after a fire destroyed a dormitory at a boarding school. The blaze on Thursday killed 16 children and injured dozens of others....

results.title: Blackburn man jailed banned from Ribble Valley over attempted thefts
results.description: Bernard Rawstron, 52, of Leach Street, appeared at Blackburn Magistrates’ Court and pleaded guilty to five counts of interference in the Ribble Valley.

results.title: Police search for shooter after Manchester Music Hall shooting injures 1
results.description: Police, fire, and EMS activity is ongoing Friday morning at Manchester Music Hall in Lexington.
